nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 北領地
nodes.summary: 北領地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联25种鸟类，包括绿棉凫、Torresian imperial pigeon、白面鷺等25种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 黑冠鸚鵡
nodes.summary: 黑冠鸚鵡（Hooded parrot，学名 Psephotellus dissimilis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Robert Collett、北領地、澳大利亚。

nodes.name: Robert Collett
nodes.summary: Robert Collett (2 December 1842 – 27 January 1913) was a Norwegian zoologist.

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Psephotellus dissimilis |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22685145A254012129 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22685145A254012129.en |access-date=1 January 2026}} | status2 = CITES_A1 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | genus = Psephotellus | species = dissimilis | authority = (Collett, 1898) | synonyms = Psephotus dissimilis }}The hooded parrot (Psephotellus dissimilis) is a species of parrot native to the Northern Territory in Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: An Australian endemic, the hooded parrot inhabits to semi-arid areas of northeast Northern Territory, and is separated from the golden-shouldered parrot by the Carpentarian faunal barrier. Though this species has disappeared from most of its original range, it remains common in protected areas
